info.title: AxiomID API Reference
info.description:
Cryptographic proof of humanity, decentralized identity resolver (did:axiom), verifiable credential signing, and autonomous agent coordination endpoints for Pi Network.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a valid Pi Network access token via the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header. Anonymous rate-limited endpoints are noted.

## Content-Type
All request bodies are `application/json`. Responses are `application/json` unless otherwise noted.

get.description: Returns basic API metadata and available resources.
Performs checks on critical systems: PostgreSQL, Stellar, Pi API gateway, and Workers AI.
Returns real-time protocol statistics including active users, registered agents, total XP, and verification rates.

post.description: Authenticate with Pi Network SDK. Validates the provided Pi access token and creates or retrieves the user's AxiomID profile.
Retrieve the current authentication state for a wallet address.
Connect a Pi wallet to an AxiomID profile. Returns user profile data and indicates if the user is new.
Invalidate the current session. Requires authentication.

get.description: Resolves a did:axiom identifier to its corresponding W3C DID document. Returns application/did+ld+json.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The did:axiom identifier to resolve. If omitted, returns the requesting user's DID.

get.description: Verifies the revocation status of a verifiable credential.

post.description: Create a new autonomous agent for the authenticated user.

get.description: List all agents belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Activate the authenticated user's agent.
Pause the authenticated user's active agent.
Perform an action through the authenticated user's agent.
Sign a payload using the user's sovereign key. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieve the signed W3C Verifiable Credential manifest for the authenticated user's agent.
Retrieve public information about a user and their agent by username. No authentication required.

post.description: Submit an identity assertion or claim a token. Rate limited.
Check the status of an identity claim using a user code. Rate limited.

user_code.description: User code from the claim initiation

post.description: Submit a query to the agent harvest system. Requires authentication and has a custom rate limit.

get.description: List available skills in the marketplace with optional filtering, search, and pagination.

post.description: Publish a new skill to the marketplace. Requires authentication.

get.description: List all skill tags available in the marketplace.
Get full details of a specific skill by slug. Authentication optional.

patch.description: Update a skill. Requires authentication as the skill author.

delete.description: Delete a skill. Requires authentication as the skill author.

post.description: Execute a skill. Requires authentication.
Install a skill for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get usage statistics for a skill.

post.description: Process payment for a skill. Returns 200 for free or already-paid skills, 402 if payment is required.

200.description: Skill access granted or free skill

get.description: Get the tags associated with a skill.

put.description: Set tags for a skill. Requires authentication as the skill author.

get.description: List all versions of a skill.
Get public reviews for a skill.

post.description: Add a review for a skill. Requires authentication.
This endpoint is deprecated and returns 410 Gone.

get.description: List skills pending moderation. Requires authentication and admin privileges.

post.description: Approve or reject a skill. Requires authentication and admin privileges.
Approve a Pi Network payment. Requires authentication. 30-second processing window.
Complete a Pi Network payment. Requires authentication. 30-second processing window.
Verify a rewarded ad completion. Requires authentication. 30-second processing window.
Submit KYC verification. Requires authentication.
Claim KYC verification reward. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a public passport profile by username slug. Includes verification badges, trust score, XP, user tier, and associated agent.

post.description: Publish the passport credential to IPFS. Requires authentication as the passport owner.

get.description: Verify the cryptographic integrity of a passport credential.
List all badges/stamps earned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Claim a new badge/stamp. Requires authentication.
Disconnect a social platform from the authenticated user's profile.

get.description: Get the complete status of the authenticated user, including profile, XP, tier, agent status, and settings.

post.description: Create a new Pi spend request. Requires authentication. 30-second processing window.

get.description: List all spend requests for the authenticated user.
Get details of a specific spend request.

patch.description: Update the status of a spend request. Requires authentication. 30-second processing window.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream for real-time spend request updates. Requires authentication.

post.description: Anchor a Verifiable Credential hash to the Stellar blockchain. Requires authentication.

get.description: List all stakes for the authenticated user.

post.description: Stake or unstake Pi tokens. Requires authentication.
Send a presence heartbeat to indicate the user is online. Requires authentication.
Capture frontend diagnostics. No authentication required.

get.description: List captured diagnostics logs. No authentication required.

delete.description: Clear all captured diagnostics logs. No authentication required.

post.description: Execute code in a secure sandbox environment. Requires authentication. Returns NDJSON stream.

schema.description: Newline-delimited JSON stream of execution results

get.description: Retrieve the sandbox development token. Loopback only (localhost/127.0.0.1).

post.description: Get a presigned URL for file upload. Requires authentication.
Trigger a data sync operation. Requires authentication. 60-second processing window.

get.description: Get current sync status. Requires authentication or CRON_SECRET.
Fetches paginated distribution of registered users, agents, and trust tiers.
Returns the top users ranked by total XP earnings with verified trust scores.

post.description: Webhook endpoint for Telegram bot integration. No authentication required.

get.description: Trigger the daily review process. Requires CRON_SECRET.
Proxy for local development emulators (GitHub, Google, Slack, etc.). Returns 404 in production.

post.description: Proxy for local development emulators (POST methods). Returns 404 in production.

patch.description: Proxy for local development emulators (PATCH methods). Returns 404 in production.

delete.description: Proxy for local development emulators (DELETE methods). Returns 404 in production.

get.description: Health check for the Cloudflare Worker backend (axiomid-backend.amrikyy.workers.dev).
Query the Truth RAG pipeline for answers grounded in the trust corpus.
Get the daily truth verse from the trust corpus.
Perform a vector similarity search across the trust corpus.
Find semantically similar texts from the trust corpus.
Get the trust score for a did:axiom identifier.

post.description: Queue a new knowledge harvest job.

get.description: Get the status of a knowledge harvest job.
List skills from the Worker backend (KV-cached).
Get skill detail from the Worker backend.

post.description: Install a skill via the Worker backend.
Dispatch an action to be executed by an agent on the Worker backend.
Send a presence heartbeat to the Worker backend.

get.description: Get the present status from the Worker backend.

post.description: Generate embeddings for provided text using the Worker AI embedding model.

get.description: Get sync status from the Worker backend.

post.description: Trigger a sync from the Worker backend.

get.description: Export synchronization data from the Worker backend.

post.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server endpoint for AI agent integration.

BearerAuth.description: Pi Network access token verification header.
